    • clearAllProperties

      public static void clearAllProperties(org.eclipse.core.runtime.preferences.IEclipsePreferences cnode, org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject prj)
      Clear all preference nodes related to the preference name given as parameter for a given project (i.e. clear the project properties).
      Parameters:
      cnode - the preference preference node we want to clear
      prj - the project on which the property is to clear

    • resetPreference

      private static void resetPreference(String qualifier) throws org.osgi.service.prefs.BackingStoreException
      Throws:
      org.osgi.service.prefs.BackingStoreException

    • getAvailableTactics

      public static Collection<ITacticDescriptor> getAvailableTactics()

    • testProfilesList1

      public void testProfilesList1()
      Test the read and write operations in preference store of a profile list.

      Create and store a new list of profile in preference store. Then ensure the read profile are equals.

    • testProfilesList2

      public void testProfilesList2()
      Test the read and write operations in preference store of a profile list.

      Modifies and stores an existing list of profile in preference store. Then ensures the read profiles are equal.

      The modification is adding profiles and changes the tactic list of existing profiles

    • removeFirst

    • getRandomSubList

      private ITacticDescriptor getRandomSubList(Collection<ITacticDescriptor> available)
      Returns a sublist of a given list. The size of the list and the order of elements are chosen randomly.
      Parameters:
      available - a list of ITacticDescriptor
      Returns:
      a sublist of available tactic descriptors.

    • loopOnAllPending

      private static ITacticDescriptor loopOnAllPending(List<ITacticDescriptor> tactics)

    • testWorkspaceProjectSpecificDistinction

      public void testWorkspaceProjectSpecificDistinction() throws Exception
      Sets a project specific profile, and verifies that this is the profile used to build the tactic. Then erases the property, modifies the workspace property and checks that the profile used is the workspace's one.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • storeProfile

      private void storeProfile(org.eclipse.core.runtime.preferences.IEclipsePreferences node, ITacticDescriptor descs, String profileName)
      Stores a profile with the given name composed by the given tacticDescritors in the given store.
      Parameters:
      descs - the descriptors that shall compose the profile
      profileName - the profile name

    • getTacticDescList

      private ITacticDescriptor getTacticDescList(IAutoTacticPreference tac, String[] ids)
      Returns the list of tactic descriptors corresponding to the tactic ids given as parameters. They are retrieved from the set of declared tactic descriptors of the given tactic preference.
      Parameters:
      tac - the tactic preference used to search for declared tactic IDs
      ids - the ids of tactics that we want the descriptors for
      Returns:
      a list of tactic descriptors

    • getSelectedDesc

      private ITacticDescriptor getSelectedDesc(IAutoTacticPreference autopref) throws Exception
      Get the list of selected descriptors of an IAutoTacticPreference.
      Parameters:
      autopref - the autoTacticPreference to retrieve the selected descriptors from
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testBug3189256

      public void testBug3189256() throws Exception
      Bug #3189256. THIS IS A NON REGRESSION TEST. Ensures that the default profile for the auto tactic is used in case of project specific settings with a non-default workspace profile. This ensures that the default preference which is serialized at a project scope, is taken into consideration. Indeed, for a preference store, the absence of value means default value. With eclipse's preferences mechanism, no value means no preference.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testContributedProfiles

      public void testContributedProfiles() throws Exception
      Verify that profiles contributed by this plug-in through extension point are correctly loaded in tactic profile cache.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testContributedProfileReference

      public void testContributedProfileReference() throws Exception
      Verify that a profile with a reference to a contributed profile can be instantiated. In our contributed profiles, "Test Profile #2" makes a reference to "Test Profile #1".
      Throws:
      Exception
